summary: Iteration 87: BIQc Homepage Layout Recovery - ALL 15 TESTS PASSED. Verified hero section height constraints (90vh-110vh), canvas containment with z-index:0/pointer-events:none, hero content at z-index:2, 80px gap between hero and diagram, all 7 sections visible in correct order, page scrolling works normally.

tests: Hero height properly constrained with min-height:90vh, max-height:110vh
Canvas contained within hero section (972px height matches hero)
Hero content wrapper has z-index:2 (above canvas)
Protect/Stabilise/Strengthen block visible with all three words
All 7 sections present in DOM in correct order
Business Signals sublabel: 'What is happening across your systems'
BIQc core shows 'Business Intelligence Quotient Centre'
Hero CTA button (data-testid='hero-cta') visible and clickable
Hero CTA navigates to registration page
Canvas does not extend beyond hero section

layout_verification.canvas_container: position:absolute, z-index:0, pointer-events:none inside .hero-background-canvas div - VERIFIED
layout_verification.body_scroll: overflow-y:visible !important on body, overflow-y:scroll on html - NO overflow:hidden - VERIFIED
layout_verification.particle_count: Reduced to 50 particles (spec: 40-60) - VERIFIED in code
layout_verification.thread_count: Reduced to 4 threads (spec: 4) - VERIFIED in code
layout_verification.gap_measurement: 80px gap between hero and diagram - VERIFIED (1116px - 1036px = 80px)

critical_code_review_comments: Hero section properly constrained with min-height:90vh max-height:110vh
Canvas in explicit container div with correct z-index and pointer-events
Hero content wrapper at z-index:2 ensures text is above canvas
Body has overflow-y:visible !important - page scrolls normally
All 7 sections render in correct order without layout breaks
Particle count reduced from 80-120 to 50, thread count from 7 to 4 - more subtle background
context_for_next_testing_agent: Layout recovery complete. Key changes verified: 1) Hero constrained to 90vh-110vh, 2) Canvas in explicit container with position:absolute, z-index:0, pointer-events:none, 3) Hero content at z-index:2, 4) Particles reduced to 50, threads to 4, 5) 80px gap between hero and diagram, 6) No body overflow:hidden - page scrolls normally. All sections visible in order: Hero → Diagram → Stats → Integrations → Cognition → CTA → Footer.

mocked_api_confirmation.note: Homepage is static marketing page - no API calls required
